title: SL 3X AU Balanced Flue Gas Fireplace | Heat & Glo
description: SL 3X AU: balanced flue gas fireplace engineered for Australia and New Zealand markets. Compliance: AS/NZS 5263. Available through AGA-certified dealers in AU/NZ.

hero.eyebrow: SL 3X AU — BALANCED FLUE GAS FIREPLACE
hero.lede: The SL 3X AU is a balanced flue gas fireplace built to Australian and New Zealand gas standards (AS/NZS 5263). Available through Heat & Glo's AGA-certified dealer network across Australia and New Zealand.
